dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3331 IS: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 50 East 100 North in Moab, Utah, as the “2nd Lieutenant Mitch Williams Post Office”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Lee (for himself and Mr. Curtis) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 50 East 100 North in Moab, Utah, as the 2nd Lieutenant Mitch Williams Post Office.

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 50 East 100 North in Moab, Utah, shall be known and designated as the 2nd Lieutenant Mitch Williams Post Office.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the 2nd Lieutenant Mitch Williams Post Office.
